boundary_binding.action_boundary: AP may decide from source-control records only; email tone or urgency cannot change bank details.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closed: current control record explicitly confirms the callback requirement is current, exact, tied to the requested action, and matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open; the prior miss was a boundary mismatch, now repaired by the exact control record.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing, scope, authority, and dependency are all tied to the current control record; out-of-band callback is confirmed as the governing dependency.

critical_features_preserved: callback requirement is current and exact
final_answer: Allow. The current control record closes the exact action boundary: it confirms the callback must be current, exact, and tied to the requested action, with actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary matching. Policy also says execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact boundary, and communication text cannot override control records. The prior overblock is repaired by this exact source evidence.
